titleStmt.title: SII 24.104: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 104. (A.R. No. 15 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers an endowment of land by sale by Śiṟiyāṇḍāḷśāni, the daughter of Ātrēyaṉ Dāmōdaraṉ Nārāyaṇaṉ and the wife of Tāya Nambi Pirāṉ, to the Śrīvaishṇavas in-charge of the flower gardens. The record is dated in the 45th year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī pukaḻcūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramattoḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyīṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayirmuṉaik kontaḷa varaicar tantaḷamiriya vāḷurai kaḻittut toḷvali kāṭṭi poṟpari naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti
vaṭaticai vākai cūṭi teṉ pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponni Āṭaiyum nannilappāvaiyum taṉimaiyun tavira punitaṟṟirumaṇi makuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭi tannaṭi Iraṇṭun taṭa muṭiyākat tonnilai ventar cūṭa muṉṉāḷ maṉuvāṟu perukak kaliyāṟu vaṟuppa—tanatu
tiruniḻal-niṟpa vilaṅku tennavan karuntalai paruntalaittiṭat tan poṉṉakar puṟattiṭai kiṭappa Innāḷ piṟkula—villetir koṭā veḻ kulattaraiyar kaḷattiy paṭṭa kaḷiṟe
maṇalūr naṭuvenat paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟum viṭṭa —jayapperunti paḻiyukantu
kuṭutta pukaḻin celviyum niraiyum—uṭait tāy vantu vaṭa kaṭal tenkaṭal paṭar
vatu pola tanperuñcenaiyai Ēvip pañcavaraivarum koṟṟa veñcurameṟṟi—mayyaṟ
kaik koṇṭaruḷi tennāṭṭellai kāṭṭi kuṭamalai nāṭṭe—poliya
pār toḻa civaniṭattumai Ena Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷiruppa tilatam Ēḻicaival tiruppa Ūḻiyum Avanimuḻutuṭai kovirājakecari panmarāna cakkaravattikaḷ kolottuṅka coḻa tevaṟku yā
ṇṭu nārppattu Añcāvatu brahmadeyam pi(pa)rān brāhmaṇa Āttraiyan tāmotaran nārā tan Ipperiya tirunā namceykiṟa tiruvaraṅkappiccaṟkum
tirunantavanañ ceykiṟa śrī vaiṣṇavaṟku nām viṟṟu kuṭutta nilam kiḻakkum pārkkellai na kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam Irumā varaik kiḻ mukkālekāṇi ya tiṭal nilam mākāṇikkuk kiḻ nāmāvarai yey kaikkoṇṭu Irā
Orumāvaraiyum kkutteṟku nālāṅ kaṇ ṇāṟṟum Añcāṅkaṇṇāṟṟum kkāṇi muntirikaiyum kiḻ mukkālekāṇi mākāṇik kiḻ nālumā varaiye yaraik kāṇiyum Āka nilam Āṟumā Innilam Āṟumāvum
kāleykkāṇi Ikkācu kālemuk kāṇiyum kaiyile koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañceytu kuṭutten periya mokūr piccaṟkum tāyanampi pirān brāhmaṇi Ātrayan dāmodharan nārāyaṇan makaḷ ciṟiyāṇṭāḷ cāniyen Innila
ttukku yāvatākavum yāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷ māvaṟutip poruḷ cela volai kāṭṭa kaṭavārallātārākavum I vilaiyāvaṇṇa periya tirunantavanañ ceykiṟa śrī vaiṣṇavaril tiruvaraṅkappiccaṟ kum tiru ppiccaṟkkum Uḷḷiṭṭa
śrī vaiyiṣṇava bhaṭṭa namutu tāyanampi pirān brāhmaṇi Ātrayan tāmotara nārāyaṇan makaḷ ciṟiyāṇṭāḷ cāniyen Ivarkaḷ paṇikka Innilam coḻavaḷanāṭṭu Innā caruppetimaṅkalattu madhyastan tiruvintaḷuruṭaiyān cirāman nārāyaṇanen En Eḻuttu
brāhmaṇi nārāyaṇa ciṟiyā ṇṭāḷ cāniyeṉ Innilam viṟṟu Ikkācu kāle mukkāṇi kācum kuṭuppittu vi nārāyaṇan mādhavabhaṭṭa somājiyen Ippaṭi Aṟiven Ātrayan vānkuṭi paṭṭane
nārāyaṇa samjai Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven Ātrayan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven tiruvaraṅkateva This inscription ends here and another begins a little below and before this line.
Digital edition of SII 24.104 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
